Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • agent_version - (Required when config_type=MACS_APM_EXTENSION) (Updatable) The version of the referenced agent bundle.
  • apm_domain_id - (Required) (Updatable) The APM Domain ID the request is intended for.
  • attach_install_dir - (Required when config_type=MACS_APM_EXTENSION) (Updatable) The directory owned by run_as_user.
  • config - (Applicable when config_type=AGENT) (Updatable) Collection of agent configuration files.
    • config_map - (Applicable when config_type=AGENT) (Updatable) Map of an agent configuration file.
      • file_name - (Applicable when config_type=AGENT) (Updatable) An agent configuration file name.
      • body - (Applicable when config_type=AGENT) (Updatable) The Base64 encoded agent configuration file.
      • content_type - (Applicable when config_type=AGENT) (Updatable) The MIME content type for the config body.
  • config_type - (Required) (Updatable) The type of configuration item.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • description - (Applicable when config_type=OPTIONS | SPAN_FILTER) (Updatable) An optional string that describes what the options are intended or used for.
  • dimensions - (Applicable when config_type=METRIC_GROUP) (Updatable) A list of dimensions for the metric.
    • name - (Required when config_type=METRIC_GROUP) (Updatable) The name of the dimension.
    • value_source - (Applicable when config_type=METRIC_GROUP) (Updatable) The source used to populate the dimension.
  • display_name - (Required when config_type=APDEX | MACS_APM_EXTENSION | METRIC_GROUP | OPTIONS | SPAN_FILTER) (Updatable) The user-facing display name.
  • filter_id - (Required when config_type=METRIC_GROUP) (Updatable) The OCID of a span filter.
  • filter_text - (Required when config_type=SPAN_FILTER) (Updatable) The span filter expression.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • group - (Applicable when config_type=OPTIONS) (Updatable) The group that an OPTIONS item belongs to.
  • management_agent_id - (Required when config_type=MACS_APM_EXTENSION) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • match_agents_with_attribute_value - (Required when config_type=AGENT) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • metrics - (Required when config_type=METRIC_GROUP) (Updatable) The list of metrics in this group.
    • description - (Applicable when config_type=METRIC_GROUP) (Updatable) A description of the metric.
    • name - (Required when config_type=METRIC_GROUP) (Updatable) The metric name.
    • unit - (Applicable when config_type=METRIC_GROUP) (Updatable) The metric unit.
    • value_source - (Applicable when config_type=METRIC_GROUP) (Updatable) The metric value source.
  • namespace - (Applicable when config_type=METRIC_GROUP) (Updatable) The namespace that receives the metrics.
  • options - (Applicable when config_type=OPTIONS) (Updatable) The OPTIONS payload stored as JSON.
  • overrides - (Applicable when config_type=AGENT) (Updatable) Agent configuration overrides.
    • override_list - (Applicable when config_type=AGENT) (Updatable) One override rule.
      • agent_filter - (Applicable when config_type=AGENT) (Updatable) The Agent Filter expression.
      • override_map - (Applicable when config_type=AGENT) (Updatable) A map of configuration override variables.
  • process_filter - (Required when config_type=MACS_APM_EXTENSION) (Updatable) Filter patterns used to discover active Java processes.
  • rules - (Required when config_type=APDEX) (Updatable) The list of Apdex rules.
    • display_name - (Applicable when config_type=APDEX) (Updatable) The rule display name.
    • filter_text - (Required when config_type=APDEX) (Updatable) The Apdex span filter expression.
    • is_apply_to_error_spans - (Applicable when config_type=APDEX) (Updatable) Whether the rule applies to error spans.
    • is_enabled - (Applicable when config_type=APDEX) (Updatable) Whether the rule is enabled.
    • priority - (Required when config_type=APDEX) (Updatable) The rule priority.
    • satisfied_response_time - (Applicable when config_type=APDEX) (Updatable) The satisfactory response threshold in milliseconds.
    • tolerating_response_time - (Applicable when config_type=APDEX) (Updatable) The tolerating response threshold in milliseconds.
  • run_as_user - (Required when config_type=MACS_APM_EXTENSION) (Updatable) The OS user used to discover Java processes.
  • service_name - (Required when config_type=MACS_APM_EXTENSION) (Updatable) The monitored service name.
